message:
Add runnable Anthropic tool call example with mock mode

Demonstrates VectorJSON's EventParser streaming a tool call from the
Anthropic Messages API: field-level callbacks (on/onDelta/skip),
early abort on wrong tool, and real SSE frame parsing. Runs without
an API key via --mock with simulated SSE events.

Also gitignore test-results/.

files.patch:
@@ -22,4 +22,7 @@ deps/
 # Log files
 *.log
 
+# Test results
+test-results/
+
 # Generated benchmark files
